creator: asami@vader.cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* Hmm, I think so too... speaking English is also too complex :-)

Sorry. ;)

 * asami> Please don't go out of your way just to change the name.  You

 * O.K., I'll rework ASAP.

Thanks.

 * Well, that's simple, but how do I specify the master site for the
 * patch ? Only just add MASTER_SITES is maybe bad idea, because the
 * directory of fvwm itself and patch itself is NOT the same... What
 * should I do ?

Add both sites to MASTER_SITES.  The bsd.port.mk targets will go look
at every single master site for every single distfile.  (Just so we
can handle situations like this. :)

Satoshi
